blocking_on: SA-RISK-002 Apicurio schema registration by D6

metadata.notes: All 6 BE layers + 5 FE steps specified. All 25 BA acceptance criteria (US-BC-001..005) trace to ≥1 test each — 100% AC coverage. Security C-2/C-3/C-4 each traced to specific classes + tests: C-2→KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest (byte-grep + reflection), C-3→CustomerIdSourceRule ArchUnit + IborGuardIntegrationTest, C-4→DevOps P1 infra verification (ASSUMPTION-TL-004). Interface contracts locked: balance=string (not number), accountNumberMasked=****XXXX, rank=server-authoritative, no FE re-sort. All 4 TL assumptions carried forward with owners, verification triggers, and fallbacks. Architecture constraints enforced: NO-RDBMS (DataSource exclusions), hexagonal purity checks, Resilience4j operator order (TimeLimiter→CB→Retry→Bulkhead), Redis SETEX atomic write, fail-open no CB on Redis, 501-not-404 for disabled feature flag. Total test cases specified: ~75 BE tests + ~55 FE tests = ~130 across unit/integration/contract/arch layers. Flag: ASSUMPTION-TL-001 (FIXED_DEPOSIT balance composition) must be verified at Layer 4 integration test against staging; escalate to PM if principal-only.
